title.en: Ye Tian smiled, not panicking, but even more ex...

content.en:
"I didn't expect that studying a ball of blood would be life-threatening!"

Ye Tian smiled, not panicking, but even more excited.

If it was just the ordinary blood of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, it would not be of high value, but this blood contained the power to kill the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, which was enough research value.

He could see that that wisp of sword light should be the remnant of a supreme mastery of the Six Realms, which was even more terrifying than the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Sword.

The key is that this wisp of sword has existed for countless years, even if the power contained is very small, far less than the power of the ten-dimensional heavenly sword displayed by the ten-dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, but it is better to be able to maintain it forever, and it will help Ye Tian even more.

"Maybe I can use this wisp of sword to create a supreme mastery of the Four Realms that suits me!"

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian was very excited.

He knew very well how much the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect helped his strength, and the requirement of the Tenth Heavenly Pass of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower was to create his own Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect.

Of course, it is not enough to create the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect by yourself, you also have to raise the Extradimensional Rule Realm 25 to the level of 100,000 Dao, so that you can hope to pass the tenth level of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower.

Ye Tian's current strength is very close to the Eighth Heavenly Level, if he creates a supreme mastery of the Four Realms, then the combat power is definitely comparable to the combat power of the Ninth Heavenly Level, and it will not be weaker than the ordinary Fifth Realm existence at that time.

"It's definitely hard to create your own Four Realms Supreme Learning, but now I at least see hope!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In the years that followed, he spent most of his time studying the sword in this mass of blood, trying to create the supreme mastery of the four realms.

......

Territory of the Four Thousand.

Tenth dimension.

Multidimensional Temple.

The projections of the Fifth Realm converge here.

The Multidimensional Sanctuary is a relic left over from a sixth realm before the countless multidimensional tribulations, and because it cannot be taken away and there are no treasures, it was later used as a temporary meeting place by these fifth realms.

If there is something big, these Fifth Realms gather here to chat, and it is very hidden, even the Sixth Realm cannot find out the content of their conversations.

This time, the person presiding over this meeting was the existence of the fifth realm level of the major overlord-level extradimensional forces, but they were all on the side of cultivators, not including the side of extradimensional creatures.

At the meeting, the fifth group discussed the next multidimensional catastrophe.

There are only hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs before the arrival of the multidimensional tribulation, and the end of the multidimensional tribulation is the multidimensional tribulation, almost continuous, and hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs are not far away for them, the fifth realm.

And this time, there were some changes in the multidimensional catastrophe, so they gathered here one by one to discuss.

At the meeting, the Palace Master of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, an incomparably ancient Fifth Realm, the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord, spoke: "Everyone, after the deduction of many Fifth Realms of our Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, we can probably determine that this multi-dimensional tribulation should be the most terrifying death multi-dimensional tribulation!"

"Are you sure it's the Death Multidimensional Tribulation?" the other Fifth Realm frowned.

The Death Multidimensional Tribulation has not appeared hundreds of times, and when he achieved the Fifth Realm, he had not encountered the Death Multidimensional Tribulation so far, and he only knew that the Death Multidimensional Tribulation was very terrifying.

Because of the time before the hundreds of multi-dimensional tribulations, the death multi-dimensional tribulation came, and the living beings under the fifth realm were almost completely wiped out, and sixty percent of the fifth realm fell, and only a very small number of the fifth realm were alive, and even a sixth realm was fallen.

Of course.

The Death Multidimensional Tribulation is also a great opportunity, and the Fifth Realm took the opportunity to break through to the Sixth Realm, and then after the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, he left the 4,000 Territory and entered the 3,000 Territory.

At this time, as soon as they heard the multidimensional tribulation of death, they all panicked.

"Damn, why is it a multi-dimensional tribulation of death, I have only broken through to the fifth realm in just a time of less than a multi-dimensional tribulation!" The person who spoke was the fifth realm that the last multi-dimensional tribulation broke through, and now his cultivation is still in the early stage of the fifth realm.

The main reason is that the 4000 Territory has no resources to help the Fifth Realm improve its cultivation at all, so it can only rely on slow penance or wait for the arrival of the Multidimensional Tribulation.

Before breaking through to the fifth realm, this one was the combat power of the seventh day pass, and he was lucky enough to break through to the fifth realm, and his current strength is estimated to be the general ninth day pass combat power.

With such strength, it is very dangerous to face the multi-dimensional tribulation of death.

There are also many Fifth Realm sad faces, they may have hope of surviving, but who has no relatives, how can they shelter their relatives when the multidimensional catastrophe of death comes?

At that time, their relatives are estimated to fall!

Then.

A Fourth Realm asked, "Can you send those ordinary extradimensional realms to the 6,000 and 7,000 realms, will it be safer over there?"

"It's useless!" said the Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm: "I am one of the fifth realms that survived from that Death Multidimensional Tribulation, and the four thousand to more than seven thousand territories are all in the Death Tribulation, and those weaker super dimensional territories were all destroyed in the early stage, and all the super dimensional territories were covered by the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, and no one could escape." "

"How can we avoid the multidimensional catastrophe of death?"

One by one, the Fourth Realm asked for advice.

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord was silent for a moment, and then said: "You can still hide in the early stage of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, but the Death Tribulation Power will be very strong, and 517 will devour the extradimensional realms one by one, so that the creatures under the Fifth Realm will fall." But in the later stage, it is useless to hide, and there will be a multi-dimensional life of death. Those multi-dimensional beings are death-based, devouring all living beings, and will also attack us, the Fifth Realm. The most terrifying thing is the multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm, the last death multi-dimensional tribulation, there was a multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm, fortunately, there are several sixth realms from more than three thousand, maybe for resources, but they finally resisted the death multi-dimensional life, otherwise, the fifth realm on our side is estimated to have all fallen. "

"Doesn't it mean that there is a high probability that there will also be a multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm this time? if there is no sixth realm, and there is no sixth realm on our side, then wouldn't it be completely destroyed?" said a fourth realm in fear.

"That's true!" The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord said helplessly: "So, at that time, the Fifth Realm who has the hope of impacting the Sixth Realm will choose to try to break through, and the breakthrough is the Sixth Realm, and if you don't break through, you will fall." At that time, whether you are willing to try to attack the sixth realm or not, you have to try. "

Impacting the Sixth Realm?

Their faces changed, the fifth realm peak existence among them was far from qualified, and the success rate was less than one in ten thousand, isn't this looking for death?

It's a pity they don't have time to develop!.
